posts.author: JulesFixes
posts.text: Finally got my old workbench back together! Swapped out the wobbly legs and gave the top a fresh coat of sanding sealer. It's going to be perfect for building those garden planters I've been eyeing. #woodworking #DIY
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing and decorating furniture, containing no policy violations.

posts.author: JaxTheArchitect
posts.text: It is absolutely baffling how some of these automated filters work. Just posted a thread about why government surveillance tech needs serious regulation and got shadowbanned instantly because the algorithm flagged 'control' as negative. Meanwhile, people posting hate speech against protected groups slip through without a second thought. Until humans are actually reviewing these decisions, I'm not trusting your content policies with free speech.
posts.explanation: This post expresses political criticism and frustration with moderation tools but contains no threats, targeted abuse, or harmful misinformation.

posts.author: SarahJ_Brighton
posts.text: Just a friendly reminder that the Community Garden Centre is reopening its gates this Saturday! We're extending our opening hours to 5pm and the new composting workshop will finally be available for booking online. Bring your gloves and come along! 🌱 #communitygarden #sustainability
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless announcement of community service details and does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_WellnessAdvocate
posts.text: Please stop sharing posts like this! @PureBalanceMethod is telling people to ditch their chemo and radiotherapy for a 7-day lemon juice detox. This isn't natural living, it's dangerous nonsense that could kill someone. If you or a loved one has cancer, please stick with your oncology team and don't trust influencers selling fake cures. #Cancer
posts.explanation: The post promotes medical misinformation by asserting an unproven treatment can replace established therapy.

posts.author: LocalNewsUpdate
posts.text: The Summer Street Fair is officially back on for this weekend! The council has confirmed all permits are in order, so expect live music, local craft stalls and a food truck line-up starting at the town square. See you there! #CommunityEvent
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement of a planned public event with no policy violations.

posts.author: FrustratedFan_24
posts.text: I am genuinely losing my mind over this app. They keep banning me for 'hate speech' when I just wrote a satirical rant about how ridiculous it is that people think robots are smarter than humans. It's clearly an algorithm glitch and they need to fix their stupid filters before I actually delete everything!
posts.explanation: The post is a satire about AI limitations rather than a genuine threat or hate speech, so it falls under allowed opinion.

posts.author: WinBigNow84
posts.text: 🔥 DONT MISS OUT ON THIS AMAZING OPPORTUNITY! Click here now to claim your FREE premium subscription and get access to exclusive deals, secret discounts and VIP events. Limited time offer so act fast before its gone forever!! #winnow #freebie #deals4u #exclusiveoffer #vipaccess #mustsee #clicknow
posts.explanation: This is spam because it uses urgent, clickbait language to push a generic promotional link and relies on excessive hashtags.

posts.author: JazzyRox_84
posts.text: Honestly, @MidnightOwl92 is such a pretentious arsehole. Why does he think he's better than everyone else just because he buys expensive gear? Pathetic. #snark
posts.explanation: This post contains a clear, targeted personal insult directed at another user, which violates the harassment policy.

posts.author: secureuser_uk
posts.text: URGENT! 🚨 Hackers are trying to steal your data right now! Click this link immediately to verify your account and enter your password, 4-digit PIN, and full credit card number before it's too late. Don't let them in! [link removed] #SecurityAlert #FreeVerification
posts.explanation: This post is an obvious phishing attempt requesting sensitive login credentials and financial details, which must be removed.

posts.author: LumaWell_Official
posts.text: It’s time to take back your health from the medical establishment! 💚 Stop taking those toxic chemo drugs and radiotherapy that are actually poisoning your body. Switch to our exclusive The Radiant Reset protocol using natural supplements and a special alkaline cleanse. Thousands of women are thriving without surgery or harsh treatments. Click the link to start your journey today! #NaturalCure #WellnessRevolution
posts.explanation: This post promotes harmful medical misinformation by instructing users to stop prescribed chemotherapy and radiotherapy in favour of unproven treatments.

posts.author: Sarah_EatsClean_88
posts.text: Finally found a way to lose weight without starving myself! 🌟 My new secret is that if you just skip breakfast and only eat tiny salads, your metabolism resets overnight. I've already lost 5 pounds in two days on this plan. Anyone else trying the #cleanfast challenge? Let's do this together! 💪✨
posts.explanation: This post promotes restrictive eating and weight-loss behaviour without indicating an immediate personal crisis, which violates self-harm policy regarding the glorification of disordered habits.

posts.author: UrbanDrifter_84
posts.text: Anyone tried that 'ice bath challenge' yet? Just got into a massive freezing lake to test my limits and it was absolutely insane! If you can handle the shock, you'll feel like a god. No one gets hurt unless they're weak, so don't let anyone tell you otherwise! #challenge #extremesports
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge with serious injury risk and must be removed to prevent harm.

posts.author: MarcusVance_88
posts.text: I'm at The Holloway Arms right now and I know I'm going to find you before midnight. You left no choice but to come here, so bring your friends or come alone. Don't make me wait.
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific threat of violence directed at an individual with a named location and time, requiring specialist investigation into the potential for harm.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_88
posts.text: I saw something disturbing near the old industrial estate by the canal this morning. A local dog walker mentioned seeing a group of people gathered around what looked like a trapped animal, and they seemed to be discussing how to make it suffer rather than help it. The area is usually quiet but I'm worried someone might follow them through. Has anyone noticed anything suspicious? #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: This post reports credible concern about planned animal cruelty and requires specialist investigation to verify the threat without exposing sensitive details.

posts.author: SadSoul_84
posts.text: I can't do this anymore. Everyone expects me to be okay, but I'm not. My head is so loud and heavy. If I don't hear from you by tomorrow morning, please know that things have changed. Just wanted to say goodbye in case I disappear. 🖤 #gone
posts.explanation: This post indicates an immediate self-harm crisis through explicit goodbye language and a statement suggesting the author may be disappearing.

posts.author: elara_vox_84
posts.text: I've been feeling like the weight of the world is crushing me down, and lately I've been thinking about just ending it all because the pain is too much to bear. If anyone reading this can tell me they're there for me or just listen, please reply. I don't want to disappear.
posts.explanation: The post indicates a personal crisis with plausible self-harm risk and an implicit request for support, requiring specialist judgement rather than simple removal.

posts.author: JazzyJules82
posts.text: Honestly, it’s getting ridiculous. I tried to block @mike_r_99 on my phone and laptop again today, but he keeps finding workarounds. Last week he showed up at the coffee shop near Oxford Street pretending to be a waiter just to talk to me, and yesterday he sent me 15 texts asking why I didn’t reply to his ‘urgent’ emails about our old school project. It’s not just annoying anymore; it feels like he won’t take no for an answer.
posts.explanation: This case requires escalation due to repeated unwanted contact and stalking behaviour that persists despite blocking attempts, rather than a single isolated incident.

posts.author: SarahJ_22
posts.text: This account has been spamming my story replies and DMs for hours. They keep saying I 'ruined the vibe' for their fanbase and demanding I delete my latest video or they'll 'cancel' me publicly. It's getting really aggressive and I don't know how to stop them.
posts.explanation: This post describes a coordinated campaign of targeted harassment and threats of public cancellation directed at the creator, requiring specialist review to assess the scale and severity.

posts.author: SaraJenkins82
posts.text: Just found this amazing deal on a limited edition vinyl! Seller claims it's rare and says to pay via wire transfer to 'secure' the order instantly before stock vanishes. Message says 'no returns' once shipped. Seems too good to be true but I'm tempted... #vinyl #rarefinds
posts.explanation: The post describes a transaction with suspicious payment conditions and urgency tactics that suggest potential fraud, requiring specialist investigation before removal.

posts.author: SarahJ_WellnessUK
posts.text: Has anyone else received a message from 'Hope & Home Charity'? They say they're organising a fundraising gala next month to help families in crisis, but when I checked their official site, there was no event listed. They asked me to share it with my network and said if I donate £50 via the link below, I'll get a special thank you note from the founder. Seems legit but something feels off about the urgency...
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist investigation to verify whether the account is impersonating a legitimate charity or running a fraudulent fundraising scheme.

posts.author: ClaraV_84
posts.text: Just checking into St Jude's Private Clinic in Bristol for my third appointment regarding my fertility struggles. The doctor says I need to be careful about what I share online, but the receptionist accidentally left a folder on the desk with my full name and diagnosis visible. It's so frustrating dealing with these privacy issues when you're already feeling vulnerable. #Fertility #Privacy
posts.explanation: This post discloses sensitive medical information and a private residential or facility location, requiring escalation for privacy review.

posts.author: Clara_Thorne
posts.text: Anyone know if Sarah Jenkins still works at the logistics firm on the outskirts of Manchester? I saw her name listed in a public directory near the depot entrance yesterday, and it looks like she's been assigned to oversee the morning shifts. It's really concerning given that someone might try to approach her there.
posts.explanation: This post reveals specific personal information about an individual's workplace role and location details which could facilitate stalking or harassment.

posts.author: concerned_mum_uk
posts.text: BREAKING: Police are currently clearing High Street in Newcastle City Centre due to an unconfirmed gas leak. They say the whole area is evacuated and people should not enter until further notice. Please share this now before it's too late! #SafetyFirst #NewcastleNews #Evacuation
posts.explanation: This post promotes an unverified emergency claim that could cause public panic or unsafe movement, requiring specialist verification of the alleged gas leak.

posts.author: wellness_guru_em
posts.text: Finally found the secret to balancing hormones naturally! 🌿 My followers are going to be so happy about 'PureCycle' - it completely reset my cycle without any side effects. I've been telling everyone that chemo is outdated and this natural supplement is the real cure for reproductive health issues. Don't let big pharma stop you from healing with The Radiant Reset method! #Fertility #NaturalHealth #HormoneBalance
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific medical claim that unproven supplements can cure reproductive health issues and discourages standard treatments like chemotherapy, which requires specialist verification.

posts.author: CitizenWatch_UK
posts.text: BREAKING: A viral video circulating on messaging apps shows 'Prime Minister' James Thorne declaring a national state of emergency due to an unconfirmed chemical spill in London. The footage claims thousands are trapped near the Thames and demands immediate evacuation. However, official government channels have not issued any alerts, and local police confirm no such incident is occurring. Is this a hoax or real news? #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post shares an unverified claim about a public emergency that could cause widespread panic if false, requiring specialist investigation to verify provenance and context.
